name: Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes Bake Time: 8 to 10 Minutes
1. Heat oven to 375°F.
1. Cream the Butter Flavor Crisco, peanut butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla in a large bowl at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Beat in the egg.
2. Combine flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Mix into the creamed mixture. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto an ungreased baking sheet. Flatten each portion with a fork dipped in flour.
4. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes. Cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet. Remove to a cooling rack.
Makes 2 dozen (2 1/2 cookies).
Source: Butter Flavor Crisco Cookie Collection, page 15.
